content_data.title: Actuator Improvement Mission
body: Phase 1: Browser / Media examples catalog standardization
Phase 2: Shared theme system and preset governance
Phase 3: Chronos-side discovery and operator workflow integration

content_data.title: Critical Success Factors
body: Examples stay actuator-owned and discoverable from CLI.
Theme vocabulary remains shared across decks and reports.
Operational pipelines stay separated from learning samples.
